_comment: RRF parity golden oracle (Hebe P3 S3.1 T1). query -> the doc whose exact terms dominate the full-text candidates. Top-1 is the tokenizer-stable part of the ranking (FTS5 porter/unicode61 vs PG simple agree on exact-term hits); deeper ranks depend on the embedding model and are asserted only at the integration tier against live Postgres. The corpus + these expectations are the arbiter (plan.md P3.1 risk note).

corpus.kotlin-coroutines.md: Kotlin coroutines provide structured concurrency for asynchronous programming on the JVM.
corpus.postgres-indexes.md: Postgres uses GIN indexes for full text search and HNSW indexes for vector similarity.
corpus.rrf-fusion.md: Reciprocal rank fusion blends full text rankings and vector rankings with a constant offset.
corpus.telegram-delivery.md: The Telegram channel delivers scheduled conclusions and deep links to the user.
